example_sentence: El marco teórico del ensayo se basa en los estudios de Bourdieu.
example_translation: The theoretical framework of the essay is based on Bourdieu's studies.

example_sentence: El resumen ejecutivo debe capturar los hallazgos clave en dos párrafos.
example_translation: The executive summary should capture the key findings in two paragraphs.

example_sentence: La sección de antecedentes contextualiza el problema de investigación.
example_translation: The background section contextualizes the research problem.

example_sentence: Se recomienda que el comité revise los criterios de selección.
example_translation: It is recommended that the committee review the selection criteria.

example_sentence: Convendría revisar el contrato antes de firmar.
example_translation: It would be advisable to review the contract before signing.

translation: by means of this letter / hereby
example_sentence: Por medio de la presente, le comunico mi renuncia al cargo.
example_translation: By means of this letter, I am informing you of my resignation.

example_sentence: La hipótesis de trabajo propone una relación entre las dos variables.
example_translation: The working hypothesis proposes a relationship between the two variables.

example_sentence: De acuerdo con los resultados, la hipótesis queda confirmada.
example_translation: In accordance with the results, the hypothesis is confirmed.

translation: based on the foregoing / from what has been presented
example_sentence: A partir de lo expuesto, se puede concluir que el modelo es viable.
example_translation: Based on the foregoing, it can be concluded that the model is viable.

example_sentence: La metodología empleada combina análisis cuantitativo y cualitativo.
example_translation: The methodology employed combines quantitative and qualitative analysis.

example_sentence: En espera de su respuesta, quedo a sus órdenes.
example_translation: Awaiting your reply, I remain at your service.
